profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your personal details and language preferences.
profile.save_error: Could not save your profile. Please try again.
profile.load_error: Unable to load your profile information.
profile.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
profile.preferences_description: Select the language used across the desktop app.
profile.account_section_description: Review the information associated with your Notely account. These values are managed by your administrator.
profile.account_card_description: Fields are read-only to keep your directory data consistent.
profile.readonly_note: Profile information is managed by your administrator. Contact your admin to update these details.
profile.language_card_description: Choose your preferred interface language for the desktop experience.
profile.language_save_error: Could not save language preference. Please try again.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Customize how Notely looks and behaves on your device.
preferences.appearance_desc: Choose a color theme for the interface.
preferences.input_device_desc: Select the microphone Notely should use for recording.
preferences.output_device_desc: Select the speaker for audio playback.
preferences.audio_desc: Select the devices Notely should use for recording and playback.
preferences.language_desc: Choose the display language for the Notely interface.
preferences.advanced_transcription_desc: Fine-tune transcription engine parameters. Changes take effect on the next recording session.
preferences.advanced_beam_size_hint: Number of candidate sequences during decoding. Higher values improve accuracy for proper nouns at the cost of speed.
preferences.advanced_temperature_hint: Controls randomness in token selection. 0.0 is deterministic; higher values increase variation.
preferences.advanced_language_hint: Force a specific transcription language or use auto-detection.
preferences.advanced_vad_threshold_hint: Voice activity detection threshold. Lower values detect softer speech; higher values reduce false positives.
preferences.advanced_vad_min_silence_hint: Minimum silence length before the engine splits a segment.
preferences.advanced_repetition_penalty_hint: Penalizes repeated tokens during beam search. 1.0 disables the penalty.
preferences.advanced_no_repeat_ngram_hint: Prevents any n-gram of this size from repeating. 0 disables the filter.
preferences.advanced_condition_prev_text_hint: When enabled, uses the previous segment text as context. May propagate hallucinations across segments.
preferences.advanced_refinement_beam_size_hint: Beam size used during the async refinement pass for higher accuracy.
preferences.calendar_desc: Connect to your calendar to see upcoming meetings.

account.title: Account
account.description: Sign in to sync your notes and access features across devices.
account.layout_description: Manage your account, sign-in status, and profile information.
account.signin_description: Connect your Notely account to sync notes across devices.
account.personal_info_desc: Your name and email associated with this account.
account.language_description: Choose your preferred language for the app interface.
account.complete_signin_popup: Complete sign-in in the popup window.
account.signin_window_error: Unable to open the sign-in window. Please verify your settings and try again.
account.signin_sync_failed: Signed in, but sync failed. You can retry from the sync panel.
account.signin_failed: Sign in failed. Please try again.

license.title: License
license.description: Activate your license and review the features included in your plan. Validation occurs online against your selected server.
license.no_features_detected: No feature flags were included with this license.
license.activate_hint: Activate a license to unlock premium capabilities.
license.enter_key_prompt: Paste your license key before activating.
license.cleared: Cached license removed from this device.
license.input_hint: License keys validate against the server you selected above. Stay online during activation.

license_server.title: License Server
license_server.description: Validation follows the server selected in the Account section. Provide a custom URL only if licenses should use a different endpoint.
license_server.server_url_hint: Leave empty to use the server selected in the Account section (Notely or your custom URL).
license_server.url_protocol_error: URL must use http or https protocol
license_server.url_http_warning: Warning: Using HTTP in production is insecure. Consider using HTTPS.
license_server.url_reset_success: License server now follows your account settings

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Connect the desktop client to the calendar you already linked in the web portal to keep meetings in sync.
calendar.unavailable: Calendar integration is not available in this build.
calendar.connect_failed: Unable to open calendar connection window.
calendar.disconnected_hint: Connect to show meetings from your linked calendar.

system.layout_description: Manage your account, calendar integrations, recording devices, and appearance preferences for the desktop app.
system.save_error: Unable to save your changes. Please try again.
system.microphone_not_supported: Enumerating microphones is not supported on this device.
system.microphone_error: Unable to list microphones. Please allow access and try again.
system.microphone_permission_error: Microphone access is not available on this system.
system.microphone_permission_denied: Microphone access was denied. Please review your OS permissions and try again.
system.audio_description: Choose which microphone Notely should use. Grant access if you do not see device labels.
system.allow_microphone: Grant microphone access to reveal device names
system.permission_hint: Device names are hidden until microphone access is granted.
system.test_ready: Press Test to capture a short sample.
system.test_not_supported: Microphone testing is not supported on this device.
system.test_error: Recording failed. Check your microphone permissions.
system.audio_processing_description: Tune optional helpers Notely uses while recording. Changes take effect the next time you start recording.
system.noise_suppression_description: Reduce background noise such as fans, keyboard clicks, or ambient hum.
system.echo_cancellation_description: Helps prevent feedback loops when recording while playing audio aloud.
system.system_audio_description: Capture audio from your speakers to transcribe other meeting participants when using headphones.
system.theme_description: Adjust Notely to match your environment. Choose a fixed theme or follow the system preference.
system.theme_hint: Theme changes apply immediately. When set to "Follow system", Notely adapts to OS light or dark mode.
system.meeting_reminders_description: Test the meeting reminder popup that appears before your scheduled meetings.

premium.title: Premium
premium.description: Manage your subscription and premium features.
premium.license_desc: Activate and manage your Notely license.
premium.features_desc: Premium features included with your subscription.
premium.unlock_potential: Unlock the full potential of Notely. Check out our plans online.

debug.title: Developer Tools
debug.whisper_description: Select the speech recognition model for transcription.
debug.gpu_hint: Enable GPU acceleration for faster transcription (requires compatible hardware).
debug.frame_duration_hint: Duration of each audio frame in milliseconds.
debug.initial_buffer_hint: Initial audio buffer size before processing begins.

security.title: Security
security.description: Protect your notes with password encryption.
security.password_protection_desc: Require a password to access your notes on this device.
security.password_protected_hint: Your database encryption key is protected by your password.
security.auto_unlock_hint: Your database is encrypted but unlocks automatically using your OS keystore.
security.remember_password_desc: Skip the password prompt for 7 days on this device.
security.remember_hint: Check "Remember for 7 days" when unlocking to skip the password prompt.
security.recovery_key_desc: Your recovery key can restore access if you forget your password.
security.recovery_key_warning: Save this key in a secure location. Without it, you cannot recover your data if you forget your password.
security.recovery_key_not_saved: You haven't saved your recovery key yet. Export and store it securely.
security.enable_dialog_desc: Create a password to protect your notes. You'll need to enter this password each time you open Notely.
security.enable_dialog_hint: After enabling, you'll be shown a recovery key. Save it securely - it's the only way to recover your data if you forget your password.
security.disable_dialog_desc: Enter your current password to disable password protection. Your notes will still be encrypted but will unlock automatically.
security.recovery_save_hint: If you forget your password, this is the only way to recover your data.
security.recovery_storage_hint: Store this 64-character key in a password manager or write it down and keep it in a safe place.
security.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
security.new_password_min_length: New password must be at least 8 characters
security.enable_password_desc: Create a password to protect your notes. You'll need to enter this password each time you open Notely.
security.enable_password_warning: After enabling, you'll be shown a recovery key. Save it securely - it's the only way to recover your data if you forget your password.
security.disable_password_desc: Enter your current password to disable password protection. Your notes will still be encrypted but will unlock automatically.
security.recovery_key_dialog_warning: Save your recovery key. It is the only way to recover your data if you forget your password.
security.recovery_key_storage_hint: Store this 64-character key in a password manager or write it down and keep it in a safe place.

about.description: Version details and helpful resources for Notely Desktop.
about.overview_description: Stay informed about build versions and helpful links.
about.updates_description: Check for new versions of Notely Desktop.
about.diagnostics_description: Upload application logs to the server for troubleshooting.

sync.auth_required: Please enter both username and password
sync.settings_summary: Configure how Notely synchronizes data with the cloud or a custom server.
sync.description: Configure server connection and data synchronization settings.
sync.provider_selection_description: Select how you want to sync your data.
sync.provider_notely_description: Use the official Notely cloud service
sync.provider_custom_description: Connect to your own Notely server
sync.server_url_required: Server URL is required for custom servers
sync.remote_sync_description: Enable remote sync to keep your notes backed up across devices.
sync.sign_in_required: To enable remote sync, please sign in from the General tab. You can choose between Notely or a custom server.
sync.status_description: Review connection details and trigger a manual sync when needed.
sync.online_sync_disabled_signedout: Online sync disabled and signed out.
sync.signin_success_sync_active: Successfully signed in! Your account has been linked and sync is now active.
sync.data_up_to_date: Your data is up to date.

binders.title: Binders
binders.delete_confirm_body: This will also hide notes in this binder (soft delete). You can add an undo later.

transcription.title: Transcription
transcription.summaryPlaceholder: Summary will appear here after transcription.

models.tiny: 39M parameters. Fastest option with lowest resource usage. Limited accuracy, especially with accents or background noise.
models.tiny_en: 39M parameters, English-only. Slightly more accurate for English than the multilingual tiny model.
models.base: 74M parameters. Somewhat more accurate than tiny at a small size increase. Supports multiple languages.
models.base_en: 74M parameters, English-only. More accurate for English than the multilingual base model.
models.small: 244M parameters. Noticeable accuracy improvement over base with moderate resource usage.
models.small_en: 244M parameters, English-only. More accurate for English than the multilingual small model.
models.medium: 769M parameters. Improved accuracy over small, particularly for non-English languages. Higher resource usage.
models.medium_en: 769M parameters, English-only. More accurate for English than the multilingual medium model.
models.large-v3: 1.5B parameters. Most accurate model available. Significantly slower and more resource-intensive than smaller models.
models.turbo: 809M parameter distilled model. Similar accuracy to large-v3 with faster inference speed.

conflicts.description: This note was modified on multiple devices. Choose which version to keep.

tags.title: Tags
tags.deleteConfirmBody: This tag will be removed from all notes. This action cannot be undone.
